title: lithocarpus rouletii
intro: Lithocarpus rouletii, also known as the Roulet's tanbark oak, is a species of tree in the beech family Fagaceae, native to Madagascar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus rouletii include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus rouletii may include teas, infusions, and extracts, although the preparation and dosage of these products should be carefully considered under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
